request.description: Implement Forge Phase 6: onboarding wizard, bento gallery, SaaS pricing table, polished room cards, global design utilities
request.prdContent:
# Requirements Document

## 1. Application Overview

### 1.1 Application Name
Forge (formerly Catbot)

### 1.2 Application Description
A multi-persona AI chat platform with debate rooms. Users can build customizable AI personas, share them publicly, and engage in conversations. Phase 2 adds real-time debate rooms where multiple users can chat, fact-check messages with AI, and receive immutable verdicts with cited sources. Built on React + TypeScript + Supabase stack.

### 1.3 Version Update
v17 → v18 Phase 5 Final Beta

## 2. Users & Usage Scenarios

### 2.1 Target Users
- Users wanting to create and customize AI personas with specific personalities
- Users seeking to share AI personas publicly without requiring recipients to have accounts
- Users needing organized conversation management with search capabilities
- Users preferring streamlined persona selection during chat sessions
- Users wanting to participate in real-time group debates with AI fact-checking
- Anonymous users joining debate rooms without accounts
- External visitors landing on public persona pages
- First-time visitors needing guided onboarding experience
- Users exploring public persona gallery for discovery
- Users evaluating pricing tiers and purchasing credits

### 2.2 Core Usage Scenarios
- Creating AI personas with customizable traits and behaviors
- Sharing persona links for public access without authentication
- Searching through conversation history quickly
- Switching between different personas during chat
- Managing multiple personas with edit/delete capabilities
- Creating debate rooms with specific topics and access controls
- Joining debate rooms anonymously or with display names
- Fact-checking messages in real-time with AI-powered verdicts
- Sharing immutable fact-check verdicts
- Experiencing premium dark-first editorial aesthetic across all pages
- Completing first-run onboarding to understand platform features
- Browsing persona gallery with filtering and search
- Comparing pricing tiers and purchasing credits
- Discovering active debate rooms with live activity indicators

## 3. Page Structure & Functionality

```
Forge (Multi-Persona AI Chat Platform)
├── Home/Landing Page (/)
│   ├── Dramatic Welcome Screen
│   ├── Animated Gradient Mesh Background
│   ├── Premium Feature Cards
│   ├── Polished Prompt Suggestions Grid
│   └── Active Rooms List (sidebar)
├── First-Run Onboarding Modal (NEW)
│   ├── Step 1: Welcome
│   ├── Step 2: Build a Persona
│   ├── Step 3: Chat with AI
│   ├── Step 4: Join a Debate Room
│   └── Step 5: Share & Explore
├── Chat Interface (/chat/:conversationId)
│   ├── Conversation Sidebar with Search
│   ├── Chat View
│   ├── Model Selector
│   ├── Persona Quick-Select
│   └── Chat Input Area
├── Persona Management
│   ├── Persona Gallery Page (/personas) - REDESIGNED
│   ├── Persona Creation Page (/personas/create) - 5-step builder
│   └── Public Persona Page (/p/:personaId) - Dramatic redesign
├── Credits & Pricing Page (/credits) - REDESIGNED
├── Debate Rooms
│   ├── Rooms List Page (/rooms) - IMPROVED
│   ├── Room Creation Page (/rooms/create) - Hero styling
│   └── Room Chat Page (/room/:groupId) - Complete redesign
├── Creator Dashboard (/dashboard) - Hero strip added
├── Settings Page (/settings)
└── 404 Not Found Page - Improved design
```

### 3.1 Theme Initialization Fix
**Purpose:** Ensure dark mode loads correctly on first visit

**Core Functions:**
- Fix theme initialization logic to always render dark mode on fresh load
- Remove dependency on localStorage for initial theme determination
- Ensure defaultTheme=\"dark\" actually applies visually on first visit
- Prevent light mode flash during initial page load

**Technical Requirements:**
- Theme provider must initialize with dark mode before React hydration
- Preview must show dark mode immediately without localStorage check

### 3.2 Dramatic Welcome Screen Overhaul (/)
**Purpose:** Premium first impression with full viewport hero

**Core Functions:**
- Full viewport hero section with animated gradient mesh background
- Large glowing \"FORGE\" title with dramatic typography
- Animated tagline below title
- 3 premium feature cards with glow effect on hover
- Polished prompt suggestions grid with proper spacing
- Maintain existing sidebar with active rooms list

**Visual Requirements:**
- Electric violet design system colors
- Dark-first editorial aesthetic
- Animated gradient mesh background (subtle motion)
- Glowing text effects on title
- Hover glow on feature cards
- Generous spacing in prompt suggestions grid

### 3.3 First-Run Onboarding Modal (NEW)
**Purpose:** Guide first-time visitors through platform features

**Core Functions:**
- 5-step interactive modal triggered on first visit to MainChatPage
- Step 1 Welcome: Forge branding, tagline, explanation, animated gradient orb
- Step 2 Build a Persona: Show how personas work, CTA to create one, quick preview card
- Step 3 Chat with AI: Demo of chat interface, persona selection
- Step 4 Join a Debate Room: Explain rooms, fact-checking, how to join with code
- Step 5 Share & Explore: Invite friends, public gallery, creator dashboard
- Progress dots/steps indicator showing current step
- Skip button to dismiss modal
- Next/Back navigation buttons
- Stored in localStorage to never show again after dismissed
- Modal overlay with backdrop blur

**Visual Requirements:**
- Dark luxury theme matching app aesthetic
- Animated gradient orb in Step 1
- Preview cards in Steps 2-5
- Progress indicator with electric violet active state
- Smooth transitions between steps

### 3.4 Persona Gallery Page Redesign (/personas)
**Purpose:** Market-standard card grid for persona discovery

**Core Functions:**
- Hero strip with search bar and filter tabs
- Filter tabs: All / Friendly / Professional / Blunt / Playful
- Bento-style card grid (3 columns desktop, 2 tablet, 1 mobile)
- Each card displays: emoji avatar (large), persona name, description, tone badge, memory badge
- \"Chat Now\" CTA appears on card hover
- Card hover lift effect (translateY -4px, elevated shadow)
- Empty state with illustration and CTA to create persona
- Loading skeleton cards during data fetch

**Visual Requirements:**
- Hero strip with gradient background
- Search bar with icon
- Filter tabs with active state indicator
- Bento grid layout with responsive breakpoints
- Card hover animations using .forge-card-hover class
- Tone and memory badges using colored tag pills
- Empty state illustration with icon

### 3.5 Credits & Pricing Page Redesign (/credits)
**Purpose:** Professional SaaS pricing table

**Core Functions:**
- Monthly/Annual toggle with \"Save 25%\" badge
- 3-tier pricing structure:
  + Starter: Free, 100 credits
  + Pro: $9/month, 1000 credits, highlighted tier
  + Creator: $29/month, unlimited credits
- Feature checklists per tier with checkmark icons
- Pro plan elevated with gradient border, \"Most Popular\" badge, scale(1.04)
- FAQ accordion section below pricing table
- Trust row: \"SSL Secured · Cancel Anytime · Instant Access\"

**Visual Requirements:**
- Monthly/Annual toggle with smooth transition
- \"Save 25%\" badge on Annual option
- Pro plan uses .pricing-card-pro class for gradient border
- \"Most Popular\" badge on Pro tier
- Checkmark icons for feature lists
- FAQ accordion with expand/collapse animation
- Trust row with centered text and icons

### 3.6 Rooms List Page Improvements (/rooms)
**Purpose:** Better room cards with live activity indicators

**Core Functions:**
- Gradient hero strip with \"Start a Debate\" CTA button
- Room cards display: topic (bold), participant count badge, room type icon (public/private), join code chip, AI persona chip if set
- \"Join Room\" CTA appears on card hover
- Live activity indicator (green dot for rooms with recent activity)
- Empty state with sword icon and CTA to create room

**Visual Requirements:**
- Hero strip with gradient background and bold title
- Room cards with hover lift effect
- Participant count badge with icon
- Room type icon (lock for private, globe for public)
- Join code displayed as chip
- AI persona chip if persona is set
- Green dot indicator for active rooms
- Empty state with sword icon illustration

### 3.7 Global CSS Additions (index.css)
**Purpose:** Reusable utility classes for consistent styling

**Core Functions:**
- .forge-card-hover: card lift on hover (translateY -3px, elevated shadow)
- .forge-tag-violet: violet colored tag pill
- .forge-tag-green: green colored tag pill
- .forge-tag-amber: amber colored tag pill
- .forge-tag-cyan: cyan colored tag pill
- .pricing-card-pro: gradient border highlight for featured pricing tier
- Bento grid utility classes for responsive layouts
- Smooth transitions on all interactive elements

**Visual Requirements:**
- Consistent hover animations across all cards
- Color-coded tag pills matching design system
- Gradient border effect for Pro pricing card
- Responsive bento grid breakpoints
- Transition duration 200-300ms for smooth interactions

### 3.8 NewGroupChatPage Complete Redesign (/room/:groupId)
**Purpose:** Premium debate room experience

**Core Functions:**
- Gradient header displaying room topic prominently
- Colored message bubbles: distinct colors for mine vs theirs
- AI moderator messages in unique visual style
- Dramatic fact-check verdict cards with premium styling
- Improved mobile layout for better responsiveness
- Maintain all existing functionality: real-time messaging, fact-checking, anonymous join

**Visual Requirements:**
- Gradient header with room topic
- Message bubble color differentiation
- AI moderator messages with special styling (different from user messages)
- Verdict cards with dramatic locked/sealed visual style
- Mobile-optimized layout
- Electric violet accent colors

### 3.9 PublicPersonaPage Dramatic Redesign (/p/:personaId)
**Purpose:** Premium landing experience for external visitors

**Core Functions:**
- Full-width persona hero banner featuring persona emoji
- Persona traits displayed as styled pills
- Premium chat bubbles matching main chat aesthetic
- \"Powered by Forge\" footer CTA
- Better first-message welcome card
- Maintain existing functionality: anonymous chat, creator credits usage

**Visual Requirements:**
- Full-width hero banner with persona emoji prominently displayed
- Persona traits as pill-style badges
- Premium chat bubble design
- Footer CTA linking to Forge main site
- Welcome card with polished design

### 3.10 NewGroupCreationPage Hero Styling (/rooms/create)
**Purpose:** Consistent premium experience for room creation

**Core Functions:**
- Add hero strip with gradient background and bold title
- Improve form layout with card sections
- Maintain existing functionality: room topic, description, room type, display name, AI persona selection, join code generation

**Visual Requirements:**
- Hero strip matching other pages (gradient background, bold title)
- Form organized into card sections
- Consistent electric violet design system

### 3.11 CreatorDashboardPage Hero Strip (/dashboard)
**Purpose:** Consistent editorial hero across all major pages

**Core Functions:**
- Add editorial hero strip with gradient background and bold title
- Maintain existing dashboard functionality: persona management, analytics, credits display

**Visual Requirements:**
- Hero strip matching other pages
- Gradient background
- Bold title typography

### 3.12 Beta UX Polish (Global)
**Purpose:** Professional beta experience across entire app

**Core Functions:**
- Add BETA badge to sidebar brand area
- Implement animated loading skeletons on all pages during data fetch
- Improve empty states with icon illustrations
- Add \"Give Feedback\" link in sidebar footer
- Redesign 404 Not Found page with better visual design

**Visual Requirements:**
- BETA badge near Forge logo in sidebar
- Skeleton loaders matching dark theme aesthetic
- Empty state illustrations with icons
- Feedback link in sidebar footer
- 404 page with dramatic design matching app aesthetic

### 3.13 PersonaFormPage Polish (/personas/create)
**Purpose:** Ensure 5-step builder looks dramatic and polished

**Core Functions:**
- Maintain existing 5-step persona creation flow
- Ensure each step has dramatic and polished visual design
- Maintain existing fields: name, avatar, personality description, tone, knowledge domain, memory behavior

**Visual Requirements:**
- Dramatic step indicators
- Polished form inputs matching design system
- Premium visual treatment for each step

### 3.14 Existing Pages (No Changes)
**Maintained Functionality:**
- Chat Interface (/chat/:conversationId)
- Settings Page (/settings)

## 4. Business Rules & Logic

### 4.1 Theme Initialization Logic
- Dark mode must be default and visually applied on first visit
- No light mode flash during initial load
- Theme initialization occurs before React hydration
- localStorage check happens after initial dark mode render

### 4.2 Visual Design System
- Electric violet as primary accent color
- Dark-first editorial aesthetic across all pages
- Consistent gradient backgrounds on hero sections
- Glow effects on interactive elements
- Premium typography with dramatic sizing

### 4.3 First-Run Onboarding Logic
- Modal triggered only on first visit to MainChatPage
- Onboarding completion status stored in localStorage
- Skip button immediately dismisses modal and marks as completed
- Next button advances to next step
- Back button returns to previous step (disabled on Step 1)
- Completing Step 5 or clicking Skip marks onboarding as completed
- Never show modal again after completion

### 4.4 Persona Gallery Filtering Logic
- Default view shows All personas
- Filter tabs: All / Friendly / Professional / Blunt / Playful
- Clicking filter tab updates card grid to show matching personas
- Search bar filters personas by name or description
- Search and filter work together (AND logic)
- Empty state shown when no personas match filters

### 4.5 Pricing Toggle Logic
- Default view shows Monthly pricing
- Toggle switches between Monthly and Annual
- Annual pricing shows 25% discount
- \"Save 25%\" badge appears only on Annual option
- Pricing amounts update smoothly with transition

### 4.6 Rooms List Activity Logic
- Green dot indicator appears on rooms with activity in last 10 minutes
- Participant count badge shows current active users
- Room type icon: lock for private, globe for public
- Join code chip displayed for private rooms
- AI persona chip shown if room has assigned AI moderator

### 4.7 Beta Badge Display
- BETA badge appears in sidebar near Forge logo
- Badge persists across all pages
- Badge styled to match electric violet design system

### 4.8 Loading States
- Animated skeleton loaders display during data fetch
- Skeletons match dark theme aesthetic
- Skeletons appear on: persona gallery, room list, chat history, dashboard, pricing page

### 4.9 Empty States
- Empty states include icon illustrations
- Empty state messages styled consistently
- Empty states appear on: no personas in gallery, no rooms, no conversations, no search results

### 4.10 Feedback Mechanism
- \"Give Feedback\" link in sidebar footer
- Link opens feedback form or external feedback tool
- Link persists across all pages

### 4.11 Message Bubble Styling in Debate Rooms
- User's own messages: distinct color (electric violet tint)
- Other users' messages: different color (neutral gray)
- AI moderator messages: unique visual style (gradient border, special icon)

### 4.12 Verdict Card Styling
- Dramatic locked/sealed visual style
- Gradient borders or backgrounds
- LOCKED badge prominently displayed
- Sources as styled clickable links
- Verdict status badge with color coding

### 4.13 Public Persona Page Footer
- \"Powered by Forge\" CTA in footer
- CTA links to main Forge site or home page
- Footer styled consistently with page design

### 4.14 404 Page Design
- Dramatic visual design matching app aesthetic
- Clear message indicating page not found
- Navigation options to return to home or other pages

### 4.15 Card Hover Effects
- All cards use .forge-card-hover class for consistent lift animation
- Hover triggers translateY -3px and elevated shadow
- Transition duration 200ms for smooth effect
- CTA buttons appear on hover for persona cards and room cards

### 4.16 Existing Functionality Preserved
- All Phase 1-4 features continue working
- No paywall introduced in Phase 5
- No login requirement changes
- Multi-model support unchanged
- API key management unchanged
- Image generation and input capabilities maintained
- Real-time messaging and fact-checking unchanged
- Persona creation, sharing, and management unchanged
- Credits and Stripe integration unchanged

## 5. Exception & Boundary Cases

| Scenario | Handling |
|----------|----------|
| Theme initialization fails | Fallback to dark mode hardcoded styles |
| Gradient mesh animation causes performance issues | Reduce animation complexity or disable on low-end devices |
| Loading skeleton displays too long | Set timeout to show error message after 10 seconds |
| Empty state icon fails to load | Display text-only empty state message |
| Feedback link target unavailable | Show error message or disable link temporarily |
| BETA badge overlaps with sidebar content | Adjust sidebar layout to accommodate badge |
| Message bubble colors insufficient contrast | Ensure WCAG AA contrast ratios met |
| Verdict card styling breaks on mobile | Implement responsive design with mobile-specific styles |
| Public persona hero banner too large on mobile | Scale down hero height on smaller screens |
| 404 page accessed with invalid route | Display 404 page with navigation options |
| Hero strip gradient causes readability issues | Ensure text has sufficient contrast with background |
| Animated elements cause motion sickness | Provide option to reduce motion (respect prefers-reduced-motion) |
| Persona traits pills overflow on small screens | Wrap pills to multiple lines |
| \"Powered by Forge\" footer CTA not clickable | Ensure proper z-index and pointer events |
| Room creation hero strip overlaps with form | Adjust spacing between hero and form |
| Onboarding modal localStorage corrupted | Reset onboarding state and show modal again |
| User clicks Skip on onboarding Step 1 | Immediately dismiss modal and mark as completed |
| User navigates away during onboarding | Save current step progress, resume on return |
| Persona gallery search returns no results | Show empty state with \"No personas found\" message |
| Persona gallery filter has no matching personas | Show empty state with CTA to view All |
| Pricing toggle animation stutters | Reduce transition duration or disable animation |
| FAQ accordion fails to expand | Show all FAQ items expanded by default |
| Room card participant count exceeds display space | Truncate with \"+\" indicator |
| Room card join code too long | Truncate with ellipsis |
| Live activity indicator fails to update | Fallback to static display without green dot |
| Card hover effect causes layout shift | Use transform instead of margin/padding changes |
| Bento grid breaks on unusual screen sizes | Fallback to single column layout |
| Global CSS classes conflict with existing styles | Use more specific selectors or !important |

## 6. Acceptance Criteria

1. Dark mode renders correctly on first visit without light mode flash
2. Home page displays full viewport hero with animated gradient mesh background
3. \"FORGE\" title on home page has glowing effect
4. Tagline on home page is animated
5. 3 feature cards on home page have glow effect on hover
6. Prompt suggestions grid on home page has proper spacing
7. First-run onboarding modal appears on first visit to MainChatPage
8. Onboarding modal has 5 steps with progress indicator
9. Skip button dismisses onboarding modal and marks as completed
10. Next/Back buttons navigate between onboarding steps
11. Onboarding modal never shows again after completion
12. Persona gallery page has hero strip with search bar and filter tabs
13. Persona gallery displays bento-style card grid (3 cols desktop, 2 tablet, 1 mobile)
14. Persona cards show emoji avatar, name, description, tone badge, memory badge
15. \"Chat Now\" CTA appears on persona card hover
16. Persona cards have lift effect on hover (translateY -4px)
17. Persona gallery has empty state with illustration and CTA
18. Persona gallery has loading skeleton cards
19. Credits page has Monthly/Annual toggle with \"Save 25%\" badge
20. Credits page displays 3-tier pricing: Starter (free), Pro ($9/mo), Creator ($29/mo)
21. Pro plan is highlighted with gradient border and \"Most Popular\" badge
22. Credits page has FAQ accordion section
23. Credits page has trust row with \"SSL Secured · Cancel Anytime · Instant Access\"
24. Rooms list page has gradient hero strip with \"Start a Debate\" CTA
25. Room cards display topic, participant count, room type icon, join code, AI persona chip
26. \"Join Room\" CTA appears on room card hover
27. Live activity indicator (green dot) appears on active rooms
28. Rooms list has empty state with sword icon and CTA
29. Global CSS includes .forge-card-hover class
30. Global CSS includes colored tag pill classes (violet, green, amber, cyan)
31. Global CSS includes .pricing-card-pro class for gradient border
32. Global CSS includes bento grid utility classes
33. Debate room chat page has gradient header displaying room topic
34. Message bubbles in debate room have distinct colors for mine vs theirs
35. AI moderator messages in debate room have unique visual style
36. Fact-check verdict cards in debate room have dramatic styling with LOCKED badge
37. Debate room chat layout is mobile-optimized
38. Public persona page has full-width hero banner with persona emoji
39. Persona traits on public persona page display as styled pills
40. Chat bubbles on public persona page match main chat aesthetic
41. Public persona page has \"Powered by Forge\" footer CTA
42. Public persona page has polished first-message welcome card
43. Room creation page has hero strip with gradient background and bold title
44. Room creation form is organized into card sections
45. Creator dashboard page has editorial hero strip
46. BETA badge appears in sidebar near Forge logo
47. Animated loading skeletons display on all pages during data fetch
48. Empty states include icon illustrations
49. \"Give Feedback\" link appears in sidebar footer
50. 404 Not Found page has improved dramatic design
51. PersonaFormPage 5-step builder has dramatic and polished visual design
52. All existing Phase 1-4 functionality continues working
53. No paywall introduced
54. No login requirement changes
55. Electric violet design system applied consistently
56. Dark-first editorial aesthetic maintained across all pages

## 7. Out of Scope for Current Release

- Paywall or subscription features
- Login requirement changes
- User authentication system modifications
- Advanced theme customization (light mode improvements)
- Animated background customization options
- Custom color scheme selection
- Advanced loading state configurations
- Empty state customization per user
- Feedback form backend integration
- A/B testing for hero designs
- Performance optimization beyond basic responsiveness
- Accessibility audit beyond WCAG AA
- Multi-language support for UI text
- Advanced animation controls
- Custom 404 page per route
- Hero section templates or presets
- Message bubble color customization
- Verdict card style variations
- Public persona page themes
- Room chat layout customization
- Beta badge removal mechanism
- Feedback analytics dashboard
- Loading skeleton customization
- Empty state illustration library
- Footer CTA A/B testing
- Hero strip animation controls
- Onboarding modal customization per user
- Onboarding step reordering or skipping individual steps
- Persona gallery advanced sorting options
- Persona gallery saved filter preferences
- Pricing page currency selection
- Pricing page regional pricing
- FAQ search functionality
- Room card advanced filtering
- Room card sorting options
- Live activity threshold customization
- Card hover animation customization
- Bento grid layout templates
- Global CSS theme builder

content.text: {"versionDesc":"Implement Forge Phase 6: onboarding wizard, bento gallery, SaaS pricing table, polished room cards, global design utilities","versionId":"app_version-bzpseb8uw8ao","versionLabel":"v19"}
